name: three-d-showcase
description: Build pipeline for the 3D Model Viewer WordPress plugin.

scripts.package-plugin: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/three-d-showcase && git ls-files | while read -r f; do case "$f" in node_modules/*|dist/*|.gitignore|scripts/*) continue ;; esac; mkdir -p "dist/three-d-showcase/$(dirname "$f")"; cp -R "$f" "dist/three-d-showcase/$f"; done && (cd dist && zip -qr three-d-showcase.zip three-d-showcase)
